Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in ERAS, which dominates the momentum rankings with a score of 97.7 and rank #1, driven by explosive returns of 978% over one year and 851% over six months. ERAS demonstrates perfect ratio consistency (5 of 5 ratio passes) and passes all four major moving average gates, while also outperforming SPY by 961% annually—a spread that far exceeds typical market dispersion. In sharp contrast, PVLA ranks #2 with more modest but still substantial performance (470% one-year return), yet shows inconsistent ratio progression, particularly a concerning 0.58 ratio from 3-month to 1-month returns that signals deceleration in its momentum trajectory. Both leaders pass all SMA gates and both show strong resilience on down SPY days, but the magnitude of ERAS's outperformance and its perfect ratio alignment across all timeframes marks it as a statistical extreme within the 700-ticker universe being scored, suggesting either a genuine sustained momentum phenomenon or a data anomaly worth investigating.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
